question: What was the total number of people reached by my Facebook ad campaign and Instagram influencer collaboration?

retrieval_results.context:
The user’s previous Facebook ad campaign reached approximately 2,000 people and generated 50 clicks to their website, yielding a 2.5% click‑through rate.
The user plans to run another Facebook ad campaign using custom audiences to effectively target people who have shown interest in similar products and maximize ad spend, building on their previous campaign.
The user’s product is handmade home decor, targeting females aged 25‑45 who value eco‑friendly products, and recently collaborated with an influencer who promoted their product to 10,000 followers, achieving great success.
The user is trying to improve Instagram engagement by seeking popular hashtags in their niche.
The user has been using Instagram stories to give followers a sneak peek into the production process and to solicit feedback on new products, including a poll last week that received around 50 votes, indicating strong engagement.
The user wants ideas for Instagram story content that will engage followers and showcase their brand.
